title: Small Ships Ecologics Compat
description: Adds recipes, textures, and items for Small Ships made from Ecologics modded wood types.
body:
This is a simple addon for Small Ships that allows you to build ships from modded wood types from Ecologics.

Adds textures, recipes, and items for Cogs, Briggs, Drakkars, and Galleys constructed from Walnut, Coconut, Azalea and Flowering Azalea wood.

Requires Small Ships and Ecologics, obviously.
